heading: Employment of civilian personnel
label: 523 Employment of civilian personnel
text: The Secretary of the Air Force is authorized to employ such civilian personnel as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subchapter without regard to the limitation on maximum number of employees imposed by section 14(a) of the Federal Employees Pay Act of 1946 ().15 U.S.C. 947(g)See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSection 14(a) of the Federal Employees Pay Act of 1946 (), referred to in text, was repealed by , .5 U.S.C. 947(g)act Sept. 12, 1950, ch. 946, title III, § 301(85)64 Stat. 843
